roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER RODERICK YUN - SFPD/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 1 TO A MISDEMEANOR PURSUANT TO 17B PC IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO TEMRINATE EM IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE/HTA1:1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX: 03-01-21 (30TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICEAND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//SA1: JAMES BEGQUIST/SA2: 1090 FOLSOM STREET, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/MO PC 1385:NO INFORMATION FILED - INTEREST OF JUSTICE/EMTERM/
